name: Toasted Garbanzo Patties
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Ground Pecans or Other Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the Toasted Garbanzo Flour and Water in a bowl until well combined.
2. Let the mixture sit while you prepare the remaining ingredients.
3. Once the remaining ingredients are ready, mix them all together until the batter is smooth.
4. When the mixture is quite thick, shape it into patties.
5. Fry the patties lightly on both sides.
6. Flatten the patties to a fairly thin consistency while cooking.
7. For best results, fry in Toasted Sesame Oil.
Delicious when fried in toasted sesame oil.
